description: Create a content slide on European private equity market priorities with a vertical bar chart on investor focus by lifecycle stage and a right-hand bullet summary in a sidebar layout.

header.kicker: Development of the European private equity market
header.headline: In 2019, PE activity is expected to focus on developing portfolio companies and making new investments
header.sub: Focus of PE investors on lifecycle stages – 2019 [%]

main.title: "On which phase of the PE value chain will you focus most in 2019?"

items.text: The development of portfolio companies is the new top priority for financial investors in 2019, up 10 ppt. from 2018
The top priority in 2018, cited by 30% of respondents, was the divestment of existing investments – At 22% in 2019, this has become slightly less important
